ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, KENNETH A. $45,374.09 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,374.09, UBS BANK USA SHALL BE AWARDED COSTS PURSUANT TO THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.)

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. UBS BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT KENNETH MILLER IN THE AMOUNT OF $45,374.09 PLUS COSTS PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. COUNSEL FOR UBS BANK IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH COMPLIES WITH CCP 437C(G) AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Discharged

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Kenneth A. Miller
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Angelina T. Evans of Lombardi & Donohue LLP, Tel. No. 1-213-688-0430 ext. 142
appearing for the Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA's Motion For An Award Of Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Kenneth A. Miller - The Court grants plaintiff UBS Bank USA's unopposed motion for an award of attorney's fees against defendant Kenneth Miller.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ac

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiff Ubs Bank Usas Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Angelina T. Evans, Esq. 213-688-0430 x142 of Lombardi & donohue LLP for Plaintiff UBS BANK USA through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UBS BANK USA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff UBS Bank USA's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. UBS Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Kenneth Miller in the amount of $45,374.09 plus costs per the memorandum of costs procedure.

Counsel for UBS Bank is required to prepare a proposed order which complies with CCP 437c(g) and states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
